mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, content, summary, status, category_id, like_count, created_at, updated_at, published_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{status}, #{categoryId}, #{likeCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{publishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 'DRAFT' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM article WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: WITH date_range AS ( SELECT date('now', 'localtime', '-' || (n-1) || ' day') AS d FROM (SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 UNION ALL SELECT 13 UNION ALL SELECT 14 UNION ALL SELECT 15 UNION ALL SELECT 16 UNION ALL SELECT 17 UNION ALL SELECT 18 UNION ALL SELECT 19 UNION ALL SELECT 20 UNION ALL SELECT 21 UNION ALL SELECT 22 UNION ALL SELECT 23 UNION ALL SELECT 24 UNION ALL SELECT 25 UNION ALL SELECT 26 UNION ALL SELECT 27 UNION ALL SELECT 28 UNION ALL SELECT 29 UNION ALL SELECT 30) WHERE n <= #{days} ) SELECT dr.d AS date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article a WHERE date(a.created_at, 'localtime') <= dr.d) AS total_articles, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article a WHERE a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND date(a.published_at, 'localtime') <= dr.d) AS published_articles, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(a.like_count) FROM article a WHERE date(a.created_at, 'localtime') <= dr.d), 0) AS like_count FROM date_range dr ORDER BY dr.d ASC
